summary: CodeRabbit latest review changed to COMMENTED while check was pass and unresolved threads were 0; actionable state needed clearer script interpretation.
User requested trigger-based self-improvement for AGENTS, skills, subagents, scripts, and project workflow without repeatedly rereading old logs.
Manual 30-60 second polling for CodeRabbit and CI repeated across PRs; user requested a long-lived watcher with notification.
External error-handling document references were injected but do not exist in the current MMP project.
Operational-only PRs touching Codex/docs/scripts paths should not require forced full CI when workflow path filters intentionally skip them; CodeRabbit and focused checks are sufficient.
